SEARCH
Package main

Class Pager

java.lang.Object
main.Pager
public class Pager extends Object
It implements the store's pager, used for dividing big lists into small sub-lists of a desired size (lines-wise), helpful when browsing (check main)
Version:
1.0
Author:
Ana O.R.
See Also:
  • Review
  • StoreProduct
  • RegisteredClient
  • Employee
  • Pack
  • Discount
  • Category
